summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Ri'DN Partner Dashboard after refactoring to modular routers. All 22 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified working correctly with fresh start experience showing zeros for all metrics.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend successfully refactored from monolithic server.py to modular routers in /app/backend/routes/
All routers properly organized: auth.py, outlets.py, services.py, bookings.py, transactions.py, reports.py, dashboard.py, slots.py, users.py, assistant.py, public.py
Shared dependencies properly extracted to dependencies.py (DB connections, auth, password hashing)
MongoDB connection working correctly with motor async driver
Fresh start experience working - all APIs return empty arrays/zeros when no data exists
Reset data API (/api/reset-data) working correctly to clear all collections
seed_data_creation: Test data created during testing (outlets, services, bookings) was cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactored to modular routers. All endpoints working: Auth (register, login, me), Outlets CRUD, Services CRUD, Bookings CRUD, Transactions GET, Reports GET, Slot Configs CRUD, Dashboard Configs CRUD, Reset Data POST. Frontend pages verified: Login, Registration, Dashboard, Bookings, Finance, Reports, Admin Console (User Management, Services, Outlets, Slot Booking), Slot Manager. Fresh start experience confirmed - all metrics show zeros when no data exists.

user_registration.details: User registration with email, password, name - returns JWT token and user data

user_login.details: Login with valid credentials returns JWT token and user data

get_reports_zeros.details: Returns totalOutlets: 0, totalBookings: 0, totalRevenue: 0, avgRating: 0 for fresh start

get_outlets_empty.details: Returns empty array for fresh start

get_services_empty.details: Returns empty array for fresh start

get_bookings_empty.details: Returns empty array for fresh start

get_transactions_empty.details: Returns empty array for fresh start

create_outlet.details: Creates outlet with name, city, address, capacity, machines, rating, solar, water_recycle

create_service.details: Creates service with name, duration_min, price, description

create_booking.details: Creates booking with customer, vehicle, time, service_id, outlet_id, amount - also creates transaction

dashboard_config.details: Dashboard configuration with customizable widgets working

slot_config.details: Slot configuration with embed tokens for public booking pages working

reset_data.details: Clears all data collections for fresh start experience

frontend_pages_tested: Login page - Form loads, validation works, login successful
Registration page - Form loads, user creation works, redirects to dashboard
Dashboard - Shows zeros for fresh start (Total Outlets: 0, Total Bookings: 0, Total Revenue: ₹0, Avg Rating: 0.0)
Bookings page - Shows 0 bookings found, Add Booking button present
Finance page - Shows ₹0 Total Gross, ₹0 Commission, ₹0 Partner Share, 0 transactions
Reports page - Shows analytics with zeros, Revenue by City section
Admin Console - User Management (7 users), Services, Outlets (0), Slot Booking tabs working
Slot Manager - Time slots from 8:00-19:30 displayed with Click to book functionality

mocked_apis.note: All APIs use real MongoDB database - no mocked endpoints

routers_created: dependencies.py - Shared dependencies (DB, auth, password hashing)
